label: Execution Steps
description: Step list with reorder, duplicate, field editing, dependency links, and visual execution flow diagram.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.5.note: No mock imports in widget file.

0.6.note: Context is pure local state (no async fetch); no isLoading field.

0.7.note: Empty state present (steps.length===0 guard with Add leg and Use template buttons).

0.8.note: Context has no error field; WidgetErrorBoundary handles render errors.

0.9.note: No dead code. readOnly from context disables mutation buttons (Add leg, Use template, Clear all) in batch mode.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass (0.6, 0.8 N/A for pure local-state context).

1.1.note: All step data from useBundlesData() hook (steps, addStep, removeStep, moveStep, duplicateStep, updateStep, operationTypes, venues, instruments, clearSteps, readOnly).

1.2.note: Context calls useGlobalScope() and derives hasDefiDesk from organizationIds.

1.3.note: Org filter: hasDefiDesk controls template availability via scopedTemplates.

1.4.note: Bundle steps are user-authored; client cascade not applicable.

1.5.note: Bundle steps are user-authored; strategy cascade not applicable.

1.6.note: Empty org scope → hasDefiDesk=true → no restriction.

1.7.note: Reference data (ALL_OPERATION_TYPES, BUNDLE_VENUES, BUNDLE_INSTRUMENTS) in lib/config/services/bundle.config.

l1.notes: All checks pass. 1.4, 1.5 N/A for user-authored steps.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live=full editing; paper=full editing (testnet preview); batch=readOnly=true — all mutation buttons disabled.

3.2.note: Context reads isBatch from useExecutionMode(); readOnly=isBatch propagated to widget.

3.3.note: Human verify: batch mode → Add leg, Use template, Clear all, ChevronUp/Down, Copy, Trash buttons all visually disabled.

3.4.note: Human verify: batch/as-of indicator visible in surrounding layout.

3.5.note: Paper mode: all editing remains enabled; step data reflects testnet context (gas estimates halved in context).

3.6.note: No WebSocket or setInterval in this widget or bundles context.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1, 3.2, 3.5, 3.6 complete. Human must verify 3.3, 3.4.

4.1.note: All buttons have meaningful onClick handlers: addStep, removeStep, moveStep, duplicateStep, clearSteps, setShowTemplates. No empty or console-only handlers.

4.3.note: Human: verify all form fields (operation, instrument, venue, side, depends-on, quantity, price) present and editable.

4.4.note: Human: verify step reorder, duplicate, remove, and dependency selection work correctly.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks inside widget render.

l4.notes: Agent checks 4.1, 4.2, 4.5, 4.6 pass. Human must complete 4.3, 4.4.

5.1.note: Target strategies: Flash Loan Arb (FLASH_BORROW → SWAP → FLASH_REPAY legs), Basis Trade (TRADE buy + TRADE sell legs), DeFi Deleverage (BORROW → SWAP → LEND legs), CeFi multi-leg. Widget is the step editor for all bundle strategies.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors. Semantic classes (bg-emerald-600, bg-rose-600, text-rose-400, text-emerald-400) are design-system sentiment colors.

7.2.note: No mock imports in widget file.

7.3.note: 271 lines — within 500-line limit. Single BundleStepsWidget component of 257 lines is within the 200-line guidance but close; acceptable as it manages a list with per-item sub-forms.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No inline object/array literals in dependency arrays. All callbacks use stable references from useBundlesData() context.

l7.notes: All L7 checks pass. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.1.note: Replaced all text-[10px] with text-micro (--text-micro 0.625rem) and text-[8px] with text-pico (--text-pico 0.5rem). Tokens landed in globals.css.

8.2.note: Replaced mt-[-12px] (line 74) with Tailwind -mt-3 utility (-12px on 4px scale). No custom token needed.

8.3.note: Uses Button, Badge, Input, Select from components/ui/*. No custom interactive divs.

8.4.note: Added aria-label to all icon-only buttons: Move up/down (lines 92–109), Duplicate (line 110), Remove (lines 113–120). Labels are contextual: 'Move leg N up/down', 'Duplicate leg N', 'Remove leg N'.

8.5.note: Human: verify at minW=4, minH=4 — step list should scroll within bounds without horizontal overflow.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed (text-micro/text-pico applied). 8.2 fixed (-mt-3 utility). 8.3 pass. 8.4 fixed. 8.5 human verify.

keepSeparate.rationale: Primary editing surface for bundle composition. Drives P&L and Actions widgets via shared context state. Must remain separate for independent resize (defaultH:7 for the step list vs defaultH:3/1 for P&L/Actions).

relationships.notes: Central widget in the bundles domain. Drives BundlesDataContext state (steps array) which all other bundle widgets read.

dataContract.notes: Steps are user-authored local state — no backend fetch while editing. On submit (via bundle-actions), the assembled steps array is sent to the execution service. Reference data (instruments, venues, operation types) from lib/config/services/bundle.config.

gaps: No validation on step fields (quantity/price can be empty or zero at submission)
Dependency cycle detection not implemented (a step depending on itself is not blocked)
No instrument search — limited to BUNDLE_INSTRUMENTS static list
coverage.notes: Step editor is strategy-agnostic at UI level. Coverage gaps are validation/UX concerns, not rendering failures.

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: bundle-steps-widget.tsx — text-[10px] used at 14 locations (lines 56,64,70,86,126,141,159,174,179,187,195,219,229,241); text-[8px] at line 70. No tailwind token for sub-xs sizes.
findings.fix: Replaced all text-[10px] with text-micro (--text-micro 0.625rem) and text-[8px] with text-pico (--text-pico 0.5rem) (2026-04-21)

findings.description: bundle-steps-widget.tsx:74 — mt-[-12px] used for visual flow arrow vertical offset. No semantic negative-margin tailwind token of this size.
findings.fix: Used Tailwind -mt-3 utility (-12px spacing token), no new token needed (2026-04-21)

findings.description: bundle-steps-widget.tsx — icon-only buttons (ChevronUp, ChevronDown, Copy, Trash2) missing aria-label
findings.fix: Added aria-label='Move leg N up/down', 'Duplicate leg N', 'Remove leg N' to all four icon-only buttons per step row (2026-04-21)
